= dict(zip(param_keys, model_gp.x))print(best_params)# ь╡ЬьаБ эММыЭ╝ып╕эД░ыбЬ ыкиыН╕ эХЩьК╡, ьЛЬъ░БэЩФmodel = get_model(method="svr", param=best_params)plot_parities(model, X_train, y_train, X_val, y_val, X_test, y_test, title="SVR: scikit-learn opt.", train=True) R2ъ░А ыЛдьЛЬ 0.7ьЭД ыДШьЧИьК╡ыЛИыЛд ьЭ┤ы▓И ьЧЕым┤ьЭШ ыкйэСЬъ░А 0.7ьЭ╕ыН░ SVRьЧРьДЬ 0.7ьЭ┤ ыДШьЦ┤ьДЬ ьГБэЦе ьб░ьаХэХ┤ыПД ыРа ъ▓Г ъ░ЩьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьЮРьг╝ ьВмьЪйэХа ьИШ ьЮИыПДыбЭ ьХЮьЧРьДЬ эММэО╕эЩФыРЬ эХиьИШыУдьЭД эХШыВШыбЬ ыкиьЭНыЛИыЛд. local minimaьЧР ы╣аьзАьзА ьХКыПДыбЭ seedые╝ эЭФыУдьЦ┤ ьЧмыЯм ы▓И ьЛЬыПДэХйыЛИыЛд. Andrew Ng ъ╡РьИШыЛШьЭ┤ Caviar approachыЭ╝ъ│а ызРьФАэХШьЛа ы░йы▓ХьЮЕыЛИыЛд. ынР эХШыВШ ьЮШ ъ▒╕ыжмыЭ╝ыКФ ыКРыВМьЮЕыЛИыЛд.1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435def run_skopt(objective, space, method="svr", n_calls=30, iternum=10, random_state_base=0, filename_conv=None, filename_parity=None, figsize=(12, 5)): fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=figsize) fig.set_facecolor("w") best_score = np.inf # scikit optimization for i in range(iternum): model_gp = gp_minimize(objective, space, n_calls=n_calls, random_state=i*100+random_state_base) best_score_ = model_gp.fun print(f"best score #{i+1} = {best_score_:.4f}") # convergence plot ax = plot_convergence(model_gp, ax=ax) # best parameters if best_score_ < best_score: best_score = best_score_ param_keys = [s.name for s in space] best_params = dict(zip(param_keys, model_gp.x)) print(f"best parameters= {best_params}") fig.savefig(filename_conv) # train, val and test result best_model = get_model(method=method, param=best_params) plot_parities(best_model, X_train, y_train, X_val, y_val, X_test, y_test, title=filename_parity, train=True) with open(f"{filename_parity}.pkl", 'wb') as f: pickle.dump(best_model, f) return best_model, best_params ьВмьЪйэХа ыХМыКФ ьЬДьЭШ space, objectiveьЩА эХиъ╗Ш ьД╕эК╕ыбЬ ьВмьЪйэХйыЛИыЛд. @use_named_args(space) ыН░ь╗дыаИьЭ┤эД░ыбЬ ьЭ╕эХ┤ spaceые╝ ыи╝ьаА ьаХьЭШэХ┤ьХ╝ эХйыЛИыЛд.1234567891011121314151617181920#spacespace = [Integer(1, 2, name="preprocessor__num__polynomial__degree"), Categorical(["rbf"], name="svr__kernel"), Real(0.001, 1000, "log-uniform", name="svr__C"), Real(1e-3, 10, "log-uniform", name="svr__gamma"), ]#objective@use_named_args(space)def objective(**params): model = get_model(method="svr", param=params) model.fit(X_train, y_train) y_pred_val, mae_val, rmse_val, r2_val = get_metrics(model, X_val, y_val) return -r2_val # optimizebest_svr_rbf, best_params = run_skopt(objective, space, method="svr", n_calls=50, filename_conv="68_vcv_8.png", filename_parity="SVR_rbf_opt", figsize=(12, 5)) ьЭ┤ьаЬ ызИьЭМъ╗П ьЛдьаДьЧР эИмьЮЕэХйыЛИыЛд. :)

posts.title: Validation with Visualization (2)
posts.text: contributor: ъ╣АэЩНы╣ДыЛШ ьзАыВЬ ъ╕АьЧР ьЭ┤ьЦ┤ GridSearchCVые╝ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФэХ┤ы┤ЕыЛИыЛд. эЩФый┤ьЭ┤ыЭ╝ыКФ ыздь▓┤ьЭШ ьаЬьХ╜ьГБ эХЬ ы▓ИьЧР ыСР ъ░ЬьЭШ ы│АьИШы░ЦьЧР ы░Фъ╛╕ьзА ык╗эХйыЛИыЛд. ъ╖╕ыЯ░ыН░ыПД ьаЬы▓Х ьЖНьЭ┤ ыЪлыжмъ│а ыЛдьЭМьЧР ынШ эХаьзА ьХДьЭ┤ыФФьЦ┤ъ░А ьГЭъ╣БыЛИыЛд. 4. ы╣ДьДаэШХ ыкиыН╕: kernel SVM sklearn: svm.SVR ьДаэШХ ыкиыН╕ыбЬыКФ эХЬъ│Дъ░А ьЮИыКФ ъ▓Г ъ░ЩьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ы╣ДьДаэШХьД▒ьЭД ъ░Аып╕эХ┤ы┤ЕьЛЬыЛд. Support Vector MachineьЭА ьДаэШХ ыкиыН╕ьЭ┤ьзАызМ ы╣ДьДаэШХ ь╗дыДРьЭД эХиъ╗Ш ьВмьЪйэХа ьИШ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. эММьЭ┤эФДыЭ╝ьЭ╕ьЭШ ьДаэШХэЪМъ╖Аые╝ SVRыбЬ ъ╡Рь▓┤эХйыЛИыЛд. SVRьЧР ы╣ДьДаэШХ ъ┤Аыаи ыздъ░Ьы│АьИШъ░А ыУдьЦ┤ъ░СыЛИыЛд:kernel='rbf', gamma=1, C=0.1ьЭД ыДгьЦ┤ы┤ЕыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░123456789101112131415161718192021222324from sklearn.svm import SVRdef svr(degree): # categorical and numerical features cat_features = ["A", "D"] cat_transformer = OneHotEncoder(sparse=False) num_features = ["B", "C", "E"] num_transformer = Pipeline(steps=[("scaler", StandardScaler()), ("polynomial", PolynomialFeatures(degree=degree, include_bias=True))]) # preprocessor preprocessor = ColumnTransformer(transformers=[("num", num_transformer, num_features), ("cat", cat_transformer, cat_features) ]) # modeling model = Pipeline(steps=[("preprocessor", preprocessor), ("svr", SVR(kernel="rbf", gamma=1, C=0.1)) # ьЭ┤ ы╢Аы╢ДьЮЕыЛИыЛд. ]) return model SVRьЭШ cross validation plotьЭД ъ╖╕ыады┤ЕыЛИыЛд. method ыздъ░Ьы│АьИШые╝ ыДгьЦ┤ьДЬ ьДаэШХэЪМъ╖АьЩА SVRьЭД ьДаэГЭэХа ьИШ ьЮИъ▓М эХйыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132def plot_cv(X_train, y_train, title, method="linear"): fig, axs = plt.subplots(ncols=3, figsize=(12, 5)) for degree in range(1, 6): # model build if method == "linear": model = linear(degree) elif method == "svr": model = svr(degree) # cross validation for scoring, ax in zip(["neg_mean_absolute_error", "neg_mean_squared_error", "r2"], axs): scores = cross_val_score(model, X_train, y_train, scoring=scoring, cv=10) if scoring.startswith("neg_"): scores = -scores cvs = ax.bar(degree, scores.mean()) ax.bar_label(cvs, fmt="%.2f", fontsize=14, padding=5) ax.errorbar(degree, scores.mean(), yerr=scores.std(), ecolor="darkgray", capsize=5, capthick=2) for title_, ax in zip(["MAE", "RMSE", "R2"], axs): ax.set_title(title_, pad=12) ax.grid(axis="y", c="lightgray", ls=":") xticks = list(range(1, 6)) ax.set_xticks(xticks) ax.set_xticklabels(xticks) fig.suptitle(f"{title}", fontsize=24) fig.tight_layout() fig.set_facecolor("w") fig.savefig(f"{title.replace('(', '_').replace(')', '_').replace(':', '_')}.png") 1plot_cv(X_train, y_train, "SVR: polynomial order vs metrics (cross validation)", method="svr") 1ь░иьЭШ ъ▓╜ьЪ░ ьДаэШХэЪМъ╖Аы│┤ыЛд ыВШьЭА ъ▓Г ъ░ЩьК╡ыЛИыЛд. эММыЭ╝ып╕эД░ые╝ ы░Фъ╛╕ый┤ ыНФ ьвЛьХДьзАьзА ьХКьЭДъ╣МьЪФ? SVC эММыЭ╝ып╕эД░ые╝ ы░Фъ┐А ьИШ ьЮИыПДыбЭ ь╜ФыУЬые╝ ьб░ъ╕И ьИШьаХэХйыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░12345678910111213141516171819202122def svr(degree, **kwargs): # **kwargsыбЬ keyword argumentsые╝ ыДгьЭД ьИШ ьЮИыПДыбЭ ъ│аь╣йыЛИыЛд. # categorical and numerical features cat_features = ["A", "D"] cat_transformer = OneHotEncoder(sparse=False) num_features = ["B", "C", "E"] num_transformer = Pipeline(steps=[("scaler", StandardScaler()), ("polynomial", PolynomialFeatures(degree=degree, include_bias=True))]) # preprocessor preprocessor = ColumnTransformer(transformers=[("num", num_transformer, num_features), ("cat", cat_transformer, cat_features) ]) # modeling model = Pipeline(steps=[("preprocessor", preprocessor), ("svr", SVR(**kwargs)) ]) return model SVC эММыЭ╝ып╕эД░ьЧР ыФ░ые╕ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФые╝ эХа ьИШ ьЮИыПДыбЭ ьИШьаХэХШъ│а ьаБьЪйэХйыЛИыЛд. C=0.1ьЧРьДЬ C=0.2ыбЬ ы░Фъ╛╝ ъ▓ГызМьЬ╝ыбЬ R2ъ░А 0.1 ьаХыПД ьГБьК╣эЦИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132def plot_cv(X_train, y_train, title, method="linear", **kwargs): fig, axs = plt.subplots(ncols=3, figsize=(12, 5)) for degree in range(1, 6): # model build if method == "linear": model = linear(degree, **kwargs) elif method == "svr": model = svr(degree, **kwargs) # cross validation for scoring, ax in zip(["neg_mean_absolute_error", "neg_mean_squared_error", "r2"], axs): scores = cross_val_score(model, X_train, y_train, scoring=scoring, cv=10) if scoring.startswith("neg_"): scores = -scores cvs = ax.bar(degree, scores.mean()) ax.bar_label(cvs, fmt="%.2f", fontsize=14, padding=5) ax.errorbar(degree, scores.mean(), yerr=scores.std(), ecolor="darkgray", capsize=5, capthick=2) for title_, ax in zip(["MAE", "RMSE", "R2"], axs): ax.set_title(title_, pad=12) ax.grid(axis="y", c="lightgray", ls=":") xticks = list(range(1, 6)) ax.set_xticks(xticks) ax.set_xticklabels(xticks) fig.suptitle(f"{title}", fontsize=24) fig.tight_layout() fig.set_facecolor("w") fig.savefig(f"{title.replace('(', '_').replace(')', '_').replace(':', '_')}.png") 12plot_cv(X_train, y_train, "SVR2: polynomial order vs metrics (cross validation)", method="svr", kernel="rbf", gamma=1, C=0.2) 5. GridSearchCV sklearn: GridSearchCV ыздъ░Ьы│АьИШьЧР ыФ░ые╕ ъ╡Рь░иъ▓АьжЭьЭД ьЮРыПЩьЬ╝ыбЬ эХШыКФ ы░йы▓ХьЬ╝ыбЬ GridSearchCVъ░А ьвЛьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьЭ╝ы░ШьаБьЬ╝ыбЬ ьВмьЪйэХШыКФ ы░йы▓ХьЭД ъ╖╕ыМАыбЬ ьВмьЪйэХ┤ы│┤ъ│а, ьЛЬъ░БьаБьЬ╝ыбЬ эЩХьЭ╕эХШыКФ ы░йы▓ХьЭД ьВмьЪйэХ┤ы┤ЕыЛИыЛд. 5.1. ьЭ╝ы░Ш эЩЬьЪй GridSearchCVьЧР ьЦ┤ыЦд ы│АьИШые╝ ьЦ┤ыЦ╗ъ▓М ы░Фъ┐АьзА ьзАьаХэХйыЛИыЛд. ыЛиыПЕьЬ╝ыбЬ ьВмьЪйэХа ьИШыПД ьЮИъ│а pipelineьЭД эПмэХиэХа ьИШыПД ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. эПЙъ░А ьзАэСЬ(metric)ые╝ ьЧмыЯмъ░Ь ыДгьЭД ьИШ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ъ╖╕ыЯмыВШ ь╡ЬьаБ ьб░ъ▒┤ьЬ╝ыбЬ ыЛдьЛЬ эХЩьК╡эХШыКФ refit=ьЭА эХШыВШые╝ ьзАьаХэХ┤ьХ╝ эХйыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728from sklearn.model_selection import GridSearchCVdef svr_gscv(degree, param_grid, **kwargs): # categorical and numerical features cat_features = ["A", "D"] cat_transformer = OneHotEncoder(sparse=False) num_features = ["B", "C", "E"] num_transformer = Pipeline(steps=[("scaler", StandardScaler()), ("polynomial", PolynomialFeatures(degree=degree, include_bias=True))]) # preprocessor preprocessor = ColumnTransformer(transformers=[("num", num_transformer, num_features), ("cat", cat_transformer, cat_features) ]) # modeling model = Pipeline(steps=[("preprocessor", preprocessor), ("svr", SVR(**kwargs)) ]) gscv = GridSearchCV(model, param_grid=param_grid, scoring=["neg_mean_absolute_error", "neg_root_mean_squared_error", "r2"], refit="neg_root_mean_squared_error") return gscv gridsearchьЧР pipelineьЭД ыДгьЧИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. pipeline ьдС ьЦ┤ыЦд ыЛиъ│ДьЭШ ы│АьИШые╝ ы░Фъ┐Фы│╝ьзАыКФ __(underscore ыСР ъ░Ь)ые╝ ьЭ┤ьЪйэХ┤ ьзАьаХэХйыЛИыЛд.1234param_grid = {"svr__C": [1e-1, 1e0, 1e1, 1e2, 1e3], "svr__gamma": np.logspace(-2, 2, 5)}gscv = svr_gscv(3, param_grid=param_grid, kernel="rbf") .best_score_ые╝ ьЮЕыаеэХШый┤ ь╡Ьъ│а ьаРьИШъ░А ыВШьШ╡ыЛИыЛд.1gscv.best_score_ ьЛдэЦЙ ъ▓░ъ│╝: 1-0.3738050475519511 .best_params_ые╝ ьЮЕыаеэХШый┤ ь╡ЬьаБ ьб░ъ▒┤ьЭ┤ ыВШьШ╡ыЛИыЛд.1gscv.best_params_ ьЛдэЦЙ ъ▓░ъ│╝:1{'svr__C': 10.0, 'svr__gamma': 0.1} ъ╖╕ыЯмыВШ ьаДь▓┤ ъ▓░ъ│╝ые╝ ы│┤ъ│а ьЛ╢ьЭД ыХМыКФ gscv.cv_results_ые╝ ьВмьЪйэХ┤ ь╢ЬыаеэХШъ│а, dictionary typeьЭ┤ъ╕░ ыХМым╕ьЧР dataframeьЬ╝ыбЬ ы│АэЩШэХШъ╕░ ьвЛьК╡ыЛИыЛд.12df_gscv = pd.DataFrame.from_dict(gscv.cv_results_)df_gscv.head() 5.2. ьЛЬъ░БэЩФ Pega Devlog: Cross Validation with Visualization 5.2.1. ь▓л ьЛЬыПД ьзАыВЬ ъ╕Аь▓ШыЯ╝ эПЙъ╖аъ│╝ эСЬьдАэО╕ь░иые╝ ьЭ┤ьЪйэХ┤ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФэХйьЛЬыЛд. DataFrameьЭД pivot tableыбЬ ы│АэЩШэХйыЛИыЛд. ъ╡Рь░иъ▓АьжЭ эПЙъ╖аъ░ТьЭД ь╢Фь╢ЬэХйыЛИыЛд.12df_pivot_mean = df_gscv.pivot_table(values="mean_test_r2", index="param_svr__C", columns="param_svr__gamma")df_pivot_mean ъ╡Рь░иъ▓АьжЭ эСЬьдАэО╕ь░иые╝ ь╢Фь╢ЬэХйыЛИыЛд.12df_pivot_std = df_gscv.pivot_table(values="std_test_r2", index="param_svr__C", columns="param_svr__gamma")df_pivot_std эПЙъ╖аъ░Тъ│╝ эСЬьдАэО╕ь░иые╝ ъ╖╕ыж╝ьЬ╝ыбЬ эСЬэШДэХйыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░1234567891011121314151617181920212223fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5))sns.heatmap(df_pivot_mean, cmap="Blues", lw=1, cbar=False, annot=True, annot_kws={"fontsize":14, "ha":"right"}, ax=ax)xticks = ax.get_xticks()yticks = ax.get_yticks()font_labels = {"fontsize": 18, "color":"gray"}ax.set_xlabel("param_svr__gamma", fontdict=font_labels)ax.set_ylabel("param_svr__C", fontdict=font_labels)idx_text = 1for idx, y in zip(df_pivot_std.index, yticks): for col, x in zip(df_pivot_std.columns, xticks): fontcolor = ax.get_children()[idx_text].get_color() ax.text(x, y, f" ┬▒ {df_pivot_std.loc[idx, col]:.2f}", color=fontcolor, fontsize=14, va="center") idx_text += 1 fig.tight_layout()fig.savefig("gscv_svr.png") .best_params_ые╝ ьВмьЪйэХ┤ ь╢ЬыаеэХШый┤ эХШыВШьЭШ ъ░ТызМ ыВШьШ╡ыЛИыЛд. ъ╖╕ыЯмыВШ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФые╝ эХШый┤ ьХЮыТдьЭШ ъ▓╜эЦеьЭ┤ ы│┤ьЭ┤ъ│а, ъ▒░ьЭШ ьЭ╝ьаХэХЬ ъ╡мъ░ДыПД ы│┤ьЮЕыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬые╝ эХиьИШэЩФэХШъ│а interactiveэХШъ▓М ъ╖╕ыж╝ьЭД ъ╖╕ыжмый┤ьДЬ ь╡ЬьаБ ьб░ъ▒┤ьЭД ь░╛ьХДы┤ЕыЛИыЛд. 5.2.2. эХиьИШэЩФ GridSearchCVьЩА heatmap ьЛЬъ░БэЩФые╝ ыПЩьЛЬьЧР эХШыКФ ь╜ФыУЬые╝ ьЮСьД▒эХйыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778def plot_gscv_svr(X_train, y_train, param_grid, plot_x, plot_y, plot_metric, plot_title=None, exp_x=False, exp_y=False, figsize=(10, 5)): # grid search for SVR def svr_gscv(param_grid): # categorical and numerical features cat_features = ["A", "D"] cat_transformer = OneHotEncoder(sparse=False) num_features = ["B", "C", "E"] num_transformer = Pipeline(steps=[("scaler", StandardScaler()), ("polynomial", PolynomialFeatures(include_bias=True))]) # preprocessor preprocessor = ColumnTransformer(transformers=[("num", num_transformer, num_features), ("cat", cat_transformer, cat_features) ]) # modeling model = Pipeline(steps=[("preprocessor", preprocessor), ("svr", SVR()) ]) gscv = GridSearchCV(model, param_grid=param_grid, scoring=["neg_mean_absolute_error", "neg_root_mean_squared_error", "r2"], refit=plot_metric) return gscv # training gscv = svr_gscv(param_grid) gscv.fit(X_train, y_train) # grid search results summary df_gscv = pd.DataFrame.from_dict(gscv.cv_results_) # creating pivot table df_pivot_mean = df_gscv.pivot_table(values=f"mean_test_{plot_metric}", index=plot_y, columns=plot_x) df_pivot_std = df_gscv.pivot_table(values=f"std_test_{plot_metric}", index=plot_y, columns=plot_x) # visualization def plot_gscv(df_pivot_mean, df_pivot_std, plot_title): fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=figsize) sns.heatmap(df_pivot_mean, cmap="Blues", lw=1, cbar=False, annot=True, annot_kws={"fontsize":14, "ha":"right"}, ax=ax) xticks = ax.get_xticks() if exp_x: xticklabels = ax.get_xticklabels() ax.set_xticks(xticks) ax.set_xticklabels([f"{float(x.get_text()):.1e}" for x in xticklabels]) yticks = ax.get_yticks() if exp_y: yticklabels = ax.get_yticklabels() ax.set_yticks(yticks) ax.set_yticklabels([f"{float(y.get_text()):.2e}" for y in yticklabels], rotation=0) ax.tick_params(labelsize=14) font_labels = {"fontsize": 18, "color":"gray"} ax.set_xlabel(f"{plot_x}", fontdict=font_labels) ax.set_ylabel(f"{plot_y}", fontdict=font_labels) idx_text = 1 for idx, y in zip(df_pivot_std.index, yticks): for col, x in zip(df_pivot_std.columns, xticks): fontcolor = ax.get_children()[idx_text].get_color() ax.text(x, y, f" ┬▒ {df_pivot_std.loc[idx, col]:.2f}", color=fontcolor, fontsize=14, va="center") idx_text += 1 fig.suptitle(f"{plot_title}", fontsize=24) fig.tight_layout() fig.savefig(f"{plot_title.replace('(', '_').replace(')', '_').replace(':', '_')}.png") plot_gscv(df_pivot_mean, df_pivot_std, plot_title) return gscv, df_gscv ьЭ┤ эХиьИШые╝ ьЭ┤ьЪйэХ┤ GridSearchCVые╝ ьИШэЦЙэХйыЛИыЛд.12345678param_grid = {"preprocessor__num__polynomial__degree": [3], "svr__kernel": ["rbf"], "svr__C": [1e-1, 1e0, 1e1, 1e2, 1e3], "svr__gamma": np.logspace(-2, 2, 5)}gscv, df_gscv = plot_gscv_svr(X_train, y_train, param_grid, plot_x="param_svr__gamma", plot_y="param_svr__C", plot_metric="neg_root_mean_squared_error", plot_title="GridSearchCV: SVR") ь╡ЬьаБьаР ьг╝ы│АьЬ╝ыбЬ CьЩА gamma ы▓ФьЬДые╝ ьб░ьаХэХйыЛИыЛд.12345678param_grid = {"preprocessor__num__polynomial__degree": [3], "svr__kernel": ["rbf"], "svr__C": np.logspace(0, 3, 7), "svr__gamma": np.logspace(-2, 1, 5)}gscv, df_gscv = plot_gscv_svr(X_train, y_train, param_grid, exp_x=True, exp_y=True, plot_x="param_svr__gamma", plot_y="param_svr__C", plot_metric="neg_root_mean_squared_error", plot_title="GridSearchCV: SVR (refine 1)") эХЬы▓И ыНФ ьб░ьаХэХйыЛИыЛд: ь╡ЬьаБьаРьЭД ь░╛ьЭА ъ▓Г ъ░ЩьК╡ыЛИыЛд. 12345678param_grid = {"preprocessor__num__polynomial__degree": [3], "svr__kernel": ["rbf"], "svr__C": np.logspace(-0, 5, 6), "svr__gamma": np.linspace(0.3, 0.5, 5)}gscv, df_gscv = plot_gscv_svr(X_train, y_train, param_grid, exp_x=True, exp_y=True, plot_x="param_svr__gamma", plot_y="param_svr__C", plot_metric="neg_root_mean_squared_error", plot_title="GridSearchCV: SVR (refine 2)", figsize=(10,5)) parity plotьЭД ъ╖╕ыады┤ЕыЛИыЛд. trainъ│╝ testsetьЭШ R2ыКФ ъ░Бъ╕░ 0.985, 0.459ьЮЕыЛИыЛд. ьШды▓ДэФ╝эМЕьЭ┤ьзАызМ ъ░ЩьЭА ь░иьИШьЭШ ьДаэШХэЪМъ╖Аы│┤ыЛдыКФ R2ъ░А 0.1 ыКШьЧИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. 5.2.3. ызИьЭМъ╗П ьВмьЪй polynomialьЭШ ь░иьИШъ░А 2ь░иьЭ╕ ъ▓╜ьЪ░ыПД эХЬы▓И эХ┤ы┤ЕыЛИыЛд. ьЭ┤ы▓ИьЧФ ъ│╝ьаХьЭД ыПЩьШБьГБьЬ╝ыбЬ ь║бь▓ШэЦИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. 2ь░иыКФ 3ь░иьЭ╝ыХМы│┤ыЛд ыШР R2ъ░А 0.1 ьаХыПД ьГБьК╣эЦИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. 2ь░иьЫРьЭ┤ыЭ╝ыКФ эХЬъ│ДыбЬ ьЭ╕эХ┤ эХЬы▓ИьЧР ы│АьИШые╝ ыСРъ░ЬьФйы░ЦьЧР ык╗ы░Фъ╛╕ыКФ ьХДьЙмьЫАьЭ┤ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ъ╖╕ыЯ╝ьЧРыПД ы╢Иъ╡мэХШъ│а ъ│╡ъ░ДьГБ ь╢ФьД╕ъ░А ы│┤ьЭ┤ъ╕░ ыХМым╕ьЧР ыЛдьЭМ ыЛиъ│ДьЭШ ьХДьЭ┤ыФФьЦ┤ъ░А ьГЭъ╣БыЛИыЛд. ьЭ┤ыаЗъ▓М ъ│ДьЖН ь░╛ьХДъ░А ы│┤ъ▓аьК╡ыЛИыЛд.

posts.title: Validation with Visualization (1)
posts.text: ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФыКФ ыи╕ьЛаыЯмыЛЭ ъ│╝ьаХьЭД эЩХьЭ╕эХШъ╕░ ьвЛьК╡ыЛИыЛд. эХШьЭ┤эН╝эММыЭ╝ып╕эД░ьЧР ыФ░ыЭ╝ эЩХьЭ╕эХа ъ░ТьЭ┤ ьЧмыЯ┐ ьЮИъ│а, ьИльЮРыбЬ эЩХьЭ╕эХа ьИШыПД ьЮИьзАызМ ыИИьЧР ьЮШ ыУдьЦ┤ьШдьзА ьХКьХД ъ╖╕ыж╝ьЬ╝ыбЬ эСЬэШДэХ┤ ы│┤ьХШьК╡ыЛИыЛд. 1. ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ & ы╢ДьДЭ ьДдьаХ WhatтАЩs new in Matplotlib 3.4.0 эХДьЪФэХЬ ыЭ╝ьЭ┤ы╕МыЯмыжмыУдьЭД ы╢ИыЯмьШ╡ыЛИыЛд. ьЧЕыН░ьЭ┤эК╕ыРЬ matplotlib ы▓ДьаД 3.4.1ьЭД ьВмьЪйэХйыЛИыЛд. ьГИыбЬ ьГЭъ╕┤ ъ╕░ыКеьЭД ьВмьЪйэХ┤ ы│╝ ъ▓ГьЮЕыЛИыЛд.12345678910111213%matplotlib inlineimport numpy as npimport pandas as pdimport matplotlib.pyplot as pltimport seaborn as snssns.set_context("talk")sns.set_style("white")sns.set_palette("Pastel1")import matplotlib as mplmpl.__verion__ ьЛдэЦЙ ъ▓░ъ│╝ : 1'3.4.1' эШДьЧЕ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ые╝ ъ░Аьа╕ьЩФьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ы▓Фьг╝эШХ 2ъ░Ь, ьИШь╣ШэШХ 3ъ░Ь, 400ьдДьзЬыжм ыЛиь┤РэХЬ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ьЮЕыЛИыЛд. ьИШь╣ШэШХ ы│АьИШые╝ ызЮь╢ФыКФ regression ым╕ьаЬьЮЕыЛИыЛд. train : test = 8 : 2ыбЬ ы╢ДыжмэХйыЛИыЛд. ьаЬъ▓Р ъ╡│ьЭ┤ indexые╝ ы╜СьХДьДЬ ы╢ДыжмэХШыКФ ы▓ДыжЗьЭ┤ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьЧмь░иэХа ыХМ эЩХьЭ╕эХ┤ы│┤ъ╕░ ьвЛьК╡ыЛИыЛд.12345678910111213df_vcv = pd.read_csv("df_vcv.csv")train_portion = 0.8np.random.seed(42)idx_train = np.random.choice(X.index, size=int(X.shape[0]*train_portion))idx_test = list(set(X.index) - set(idx_train))X_train = X.loc[idx_train]X_test = X.loc[idx_test]y_train = y.loc[idx_train]y_test = y.loc[idx_test] 2. ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ы╢ДэПм эЩХьЭ╕ ьк╝ъ░а trainset, testsetьЭД эЩХьЭ╕эХйыЛИыЛд. ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ы╢ДэПмые╝ ы╣ДьЬиыбЬ ъ╖╕ыадьДЬ trainsetъ│╝ testsetьЭ┤ ы╣ДьК╖эХЬьзА ы┤ЕыЛИыЛд. trainьЭД green, testые╝ magentaыбЬ ыВШыЮАэЮИ ъ╖╕ыадьДЬ ы╣Дъ╡РэХйыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445fig, axes = plt.subplots(ncols=3, nrows=2, figsize=(12, 8))axs = axes.ravel()for ax, col in zip(axs, df_vcv.columns): # X features if col != "target": if df_vcv[col].dtype == "O": # categorical df_train = df_vcv.loc[idx_train, col].value_counts().reset_index() df_test = df_vcv.loc[idx_test, col].value_counts().reset_index() width_cat = 0.4 ax.bar(df_train.index-width_cat/2, df_train[col]/len(idx_train), width=width_cat, ec="g", fc="#AAFFAADD") ax.bar(df_test.index+width_cat/2, df_test[col]/len(idx_test), width=width_cat, ec="m", fc="#FFAAFFDD") ax.set_xticks(list(range(df_train.shape[0]))) ax.set_xticklabels(df_train["index"].values) else: # numerical bins = np.linspace(df_vcv[col].min(), df_vcv[col].max(), 20) bins_center = (bins[:-1] + bins[1:])/2 bins_delta = bins[1] - bins[0] counts_train, bins_train = np.histogram(df_vcv.loc[idx_train, col], bins=bins) counts_test, bins_test = np.histogram(df_vcv.loc[idx_test, col], bins=bins) width_num = bins_delta/2 ax.bar(bins_center-width_num/2, counts_train/len(idx_train), width=width_num, ec="g", fc="#AAFFAADD") ax.bar(bins_center+width_num/2, counts_test/len(idx_test), width=width_num, ec="m", fc="#FFAAFFDD") # y feature else: sns.kdeplot(df_vcv.loc[idx_train, col], color="g", fill=True, ax=ax, label="train") sns.kdeplot(df_vcv.loc[idx_test, col], color="m", fill=True, ax=ax, label="test") ax.set_ylabel("") if col in ["A", "D"]: coltype = "categorical" else: coltype = "numerical" ax.set_title(f"{col} ({coltype})", pad=12)handles, labels = axs[5].get_legend_handles_labels()axs[2].legend(handles, labels, loc="upper left", bbox_to_anchor=(1,0.9)) fig.tight_layout()fig.savefig("6_vcv_01.png") 3. Machine Learning ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ьаДь▓ШыжмьЩА ьДаэШХэЪМъ╖АьЧР эХДьЪФэХЬ ыЭ╝ьЭ┤ы╕МыЯмыжмые╝ ы╢ИыЯмьШ╡ыЛИыЛд.1234567891011# encoderfrom sklearn.preprocessing import OneHotEncoder# machine learning modelsfrom sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScalerfrom sklearn.preprocessing import PolynomialFeaturesfrom sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression# pipelinefrom sklearn.pipeline import Pipelinefrom sklearn.compose import ColumnTransformer 3.1. Pipeline ъ╡мь╢Х sklearn: Column Transformer with Mixed Types scalerьЩА one-hot encoder ыУ▒ьЭД ьИШэЦЙэХШый░ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ъ░А ы░ФыАМыКФ ъ│╝ьаХьЭД ы░ФыЭ╝ы│╝ ьИШ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ы│АэЩШьЭ┤ ыИИъ│╝ ьЖРьЧР ьЭ╡ьзА ьХКьХШьЭД ыХМыКФ ьЬаьЪйэХЬ ы░йы▓ХьЭ┤ьзАызМ ъ╣КьЭ┤ ы╢ДьДЭэХШъ╕░ьЧФ эХЬъ│Дъ░А ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьШИые╝ ыУдьЦ┤ feature importanceые╝ ыПДь╢ЬэХа ыХМ, one-hot encodingьЭ┤ ьИШэЦЙыРЬ ы▓Фьг╝эШХ ьЭ╕ьЮРыКФ ьЫРьЖМ эХШыВШэХШыВШьЧР ыМАэХЬ ьдСьЪФыПДъ░А ыВШьЩАы▓Дыад ьаХьЮС ьЭ╕ьЮРьЭШ ьдСьЪФыПДые╝ ъ╡мэХШъ╕░ ьЦ┤ыа╡ьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ь▓┤ъ│ДьаБьЬ╝ыбЬ ы╢ДьДЭэХа ьИШ ьЮИыПДыбЭ pipelineьЭД ъ╡мь╢ХэХйьЛЬыЛд. ы▓Фьг╝эШХ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ьЩА ьИШь╣ШэШХ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ьЧР ыЛдые╕ ьаДь▓Шыжмые╝ ьИШэЦЙэХйыЛИыЛд. sklearnьЭШ set_config(display='diagram')ьЭД ьЭ┤ьЪйэХШый┤ ъ╖╕ыж╝ьЬ╝ыбЬ ы│╝ ьИШ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930# linear regression modeldef linear(degree): # categorical and numerical features cat_features = ["A", "D"] cat_transformer = OneHotEncoder(sparse=False) num_features = ["B", "C", "E"] num_transformer = Pipeline(steps=[("scaler", StandardScaler()), ("polynomial", PolynomialFeatures(degree=degree, include_bias=True))]) # preprocessor preprocessor = ColumnTransformer(transformers=[("num", num_transformer, num_features), ("cat", cat_transformer, cat_features) ]) # modeling model = Pipeline(steps=[("preprocessor", preprocessor), ("linear", LinearRegression()) ]) return model# pipeline output from sklearn import set_configset_config(display='diagram') model = linear(3)display(model) set_config(display='text')ые╝ эЖ╡эХ┤ ь╢Ьыае ыкиыУЬые╝ ы░Фъ┐А ьИШ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд.12set_config(display='text') model.fit(X_train, y_train) ьЛдэЦЙ ъ▓░ъ│╝1234567891011Pipeline(steps=[('preprocessor', ColumnTransformer(transformers=[('num', Pipeline(steps=[('scaler', StandardScaler()), ('polynomial', PolynomialFeatures(degree=3))]), ['B', 'C', 'E']), ('cat', OneHotEncoder(sparse=False), ['A', 'D'])])), ('linear', LinearRegression())]) 3.2. эПЙъ░А: metrics эММьЭ┤эФДыЭ╝ьЭ╕ьЬ╝ыбЬ ъ╡мь╢ХэХЬ ыи╕ьЛаыЯмыЛЭ ыкиыН╕ьЭШ ьД▒ыКеьЭД эПЙъ░АэХйыЛИыЛд. эПЙъ░А ьзАэСЬыбЬыКФ MAE(mean absolute error), RMSE(root mean squared error), R2(coefficient of determination)ые╝ ьВмьЪйэХйыЛИыЛд. ыкиыН╕ъ│╝ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ые╝ ыДгьЬ╝ый┤ ьШИь╕бъ▓░ъ│╝ьЩА эПЙъ░АьзАэСЬые╝ ы╜СьХДьг╝ыКФ эХиьИШые╝ ызМыУныЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░ 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334# evaluation metricsfrom sklearn.metrics import mean_absolute_error as mae_from sklearn.metrics import mean_squared_error as mse_from sklearn.metrics import r2_score as r2_# эПЙъ░АьзАэСЬ ъ│ДьВ░ эХиьИШdef get_metrics(model, X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test): # train y_pred_train = model.predict(X_train) mae_train = mae_(y_train, y_pred_train) rmse_train = np.sqrt(mse_(y_train, y_pred_train)) r2_train = r2_(y_train, y_pred_train) # test y_pred_test = model.predict(X_test) mae_test = mae_(y_test, y_pred_test) rmse_test = mse_(y_test, y_pred_test, squared=False) r2_test = r2_(y_test, y_pred_test) return y_pred_train,y_pred_test, mae_train, mae_test, rmse_train, rmse_test, r2_train, r2_test# эПЙъ░АьзАэСЬ ыПДь╢Ьy_pred_train, y_pred_test, mae_train, mae_test, rmse_train, rmse_test, r2_train, r2_test = \get_metrics(model, X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test)# эПЙъ░АьзАэСЬ ь╢Ьыаеprint("# train dataset")print(f" MAE : {mae_train:.3f}")print(f" RMSE: {rmse_train:.3f}")print(f" R2 : {r2_train:.3f}")print("\n# test dataset")print(f" MAE : {mae_test:.3f}")print(f" RMSE: {rmse_test:.3f}")print(f" R2 : {r2_test:.3f}") ьЛдэЦЙ ъ▓░ъ│╝: 123456789# train dataset MAE : 0.394 RMSE: 0.537 R2 : 0.513# test dataset MAE : 0.427 RMSE: 0.568 R2 : 0.379 3.3. Visualization: Parity Plot ыи╕ьЛаыЯмыЛЭ ыкиыН╕ьЭШ ьШИь╕быаеьЭА эПЙъ░А ьзАэСЬьЩА ъ░ЩьЭА ьИШь╣ШыбЬ ыПДь╢ЬыРШьзАызМ ь╢йы╢ДэХШьзА ьХКьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьЦ┤ыЦд ы╢Аы╢ДьЭ┤ ьЮШ ызЮъ│а ьЦ┤ыФФъ░А эЛАыж░ьзА эЩХьЭ╕эХ┤ьХ╝ ы│┤ьЩДэХа ьИШ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФые╝ эЖ╡эХ┤ эЩХьЭ╕эХ┤ ы┤ЕьЛЬыЛд. ь░╕ъ░Тъ│╝ ьШИь╕бъ░ТьЭД ы╣Дъ╡РэХШыКФ ы░йы▓ХьЬ╝ыбЬ parity plotьЭД эЭФэЮИ ьВмьЪйэХйыЛИыЛд. ь░╕ъ░Тъ│╝ ьШИь╕бъ░ТьЭ┤ y = xьЧР ъ░Аъ╣МьЪ╕ ьИШыбЭ ьвЛьК╡ыЛИыЛд. xьЩА yь╢Х ы▓ФьЬДые╝ ьЭ╝ь╣ШьЛЬь╝Ь ъ╖╕ыж╜ыЛИыЛд. return axыбЬ axesые╝ ы░ЫьЭД ьИШ ьЮИыПДыбЭ ьДдъ│ДэХйыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445def plot_parity(true, predict, c="c", mae=None, rmse=None, r2=None, equal=False, title=None, xlabel="true", ylabel="predict", ax=None): # if axes not defined, create one. if not ax: fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(4, 4)) # scatter plot ax.scatter(true, predict, c=c, s=10, alpha=0.3) # x, y limits min_ = min(ax.get_xbound()[0], ax.get_ybound()[0]) max_ = max(ax.get_xbound()[1], ax.get_ybound()[1]) ax.set_xlim(min_, max_) ax.set_ylim(min_, max_) # x, y ticks lb, ub = ax.get_ybound() ticks =[x for x in ax.get_xticks() if x >= lb and x <= ub] ax.set_xticks(ticks) ax.set_xticklabels(ticks) ax.set_yticks(ticks) ax.set_yticklabels(ticks) # grids ax.set_aspect("equal") ax.grid(axis="both", c="lightgray") if equal: ax.plot([lb, ub], [lb, ub], c="k", alpha=0.3) # x, y labels and title ax.set_xlabel(xlabel, fontsize=16, labelpad=8) ax.set_ylabel(ylabel, fontsize=16, labelpad=8) ax.set_title(title, fontsize=16, pad=8) # metrics ax.text(0.95, 0.3, f" MAE ={mae:0.3f}", transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=16, ha="right") ax.text(0.95, 0.22, f"RMSE ={rmse:0.3f}", transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=16, ha="right") ax.text(0.95, 0.14, f"R2 ={r2:0.3f}", transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=16, ha="right") return ax 1234ax = plot_parity(y_train, y_pred_train, mae=mae_train, rmse=rmse_train, r2=r2_train, equal=True)fig = ax.figure # axesъ░А ьЖНэХЬ figure ьаСъ╖╝fig.tight_layout()fig.savefig("6_vcv_02.png") 3.4. Visualization: Parity Plots train dataьЩА test ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ые╝ эХиъ╗Ш ъ╖╕ыжмыадъ│а эХйыЛИыЛд. ы░йъ╕И ызМыУа plot_parity() эХиьИШые╝ ыСР ы▓И ьВмьЪйэХйыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829def plot_parities(X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test, title): # get metrics y_pred_train, y_pred_test, mae_train, mae_test, rmse_train, rmse_test, r2_train, r2_test = \ get_metrics(model, X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test) # figure prepartion fig, axs = plt.subplots(ncols=2, figsize=(8, 5), sharex=True, sharey=True) c_train, c_test = "g", "m" axs[0] = plot_parity(y_train, y_pred_train, c_train, mae_train, rmse_train, r2_train, title=f"train", ax=axs[0]) min0, max0 = axs[0].get_xbound() axs[1] = plot_parity(y_test, y_pred_test, c_test, mae_test, rmse_test, r2_test, title=f"test", ax=axs[1]) min1, max1 = axs[1].get_xbound() # mis setting axs[1].set_ylabel(None) min_, max_ = min(min0, min1), max(max0, max1) axs[1].set_xlim(min_, max_) axs[1].set_ylim(min_, max_) for ax in axs: ax.plot([min_, max_], [min_, max_], "k", alpha=0.3) fig.suptitle(title, fontsize=20, ha="center") fig.tight_layout() fig.savefig(f"{title}.png") 1plot_parities(X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test, "linear regression (degree=3)") train, test ъ▓░ъ│╝ъ░А ыкиыСР ызИьЭМьЧР ыУдьзА ьХКьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьДаэШХэЪМъ╖А ь░иьИШые╝ ы░Фъ┐ФьДЬ эЩХьЭ╕эХйьЛЬыЛд. ыи╝ьаА, 1ь░и эХиьИШые╝ ьЛЬыПДэХ┤ ы┤ЕыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░1234567model = linear(1)model.fit(X_train, y_train)y_pred_train, y_pred_test, mae_train, mae_test, rmse_train, rmse_test, r2_train, r2_test = \get_metrics(model, X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test)plot_parities(X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test, "linear regression (degree=1)") ьЧньЛЬ ы│ДыбЬьЮЕыЛИыЛд. ьЭ┤ы▓ИьЧРыКФ 5ь░и эХиьИШые╝ ьЛЬыПДэХйыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░1234567model = linear(5)model.fit(X_train, y_train)y_pred_train, y_pred_test, mae_train, mae_test, rmse_train, rmse_test, r2_train, r2_test = \get_metrics(model, X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test)plot_parities(X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test, "linear regression (degree=5)") 1, 3, 5ь░и ыкиыСР ызИьЭМьЧР ыУдьзА ьХКьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ь░иьИШьЧР ыМАэХЬ ъ▓╜эЦеьЭД ы│┤ый┤ ыЛ╡ьЧР ъ░Аъ╣МьЫМьзИ ъ▓Г ъ░ЩьК╡ыЛИыЛд. Grid Searchые╝ ьВмьЪйэХШый┤ ьвЛьЭД ъ▓Г ъ░ЩьК╡ыЛИыЛд. 3.5. Grid Search: polynomial order sklearnьЧРьДЬ ьаЬъ│╡эХШыКФ GridSearchCVыКФ ыЛдьЭМьЧР ьФБьЛЬыЛд. ы│АьИШъ░А эХШыВШы┐РьЭ┤ыЛИ ьИШыПЩьЬ╝ыбЬ ы░Фъ╛╕ьЦ┤ъ░Аый┤ьДЬ ьД▒ыКеьЭД эПЙъ░АэХйыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061def plot_metrics(X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test, title): maes_train, maes_test = [], [] rmses_train, rmses_test = [], [] r2s_train, r2s_test = [], [] # polynomial degree for degree in range(1, 6): # model build model = linear(degree) model.fit(X_train, y_train) # model evaluation y_pred_train, y_pred_test, mae_train, mae_test, rmse_train, rmse_test, r2_train, r2_test = \ get_metrics(model, X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test) # store metrics maes_train.append(mae_train) maes_test.append(mae_test) rmses_train.append(rmse_train) rmses_test.append(rmse_test) r2s_train.append(r2_train) r2s_test.append(r2_test) # data visualization fig, axs = plt.subplots(ncols=3, figsize=(12, 5)) axs[0].plot(maes_train, maes_test, "ro-", lw=3) axs[1].plot(rmses_train, rmses_test, "go-", lw=3) axs[2].plot(r2s_train, r2s_test, "bo-", lw=3) # numbering: degree for i in range(len(maes_train)): axs[0].text(maes_train[i], maes_test[i], str(i+1), ha="center", fontsize=14, bbox = {"boxstyle":"circle", "facecolor":"w", "edgecolor":"r"}) axs[1].text(rmses_train[i], rmses_test[i], str(i+1), ha="center", fontsize=14, bbox = {"boxstyle":"circle", "facecolor":"w", "edgecolor":"g"}) axs[2].text(r2s_train[i], r2s_test[i], str(i+1), ha="center", fontsize=14, bbox = {"boxstyle":"circle", "facecolor":"w", "edgecolor":"b"}) # mis for ax, metric in zip(axs, ["MAE", "RMSE", "R2"]): min_ = min(ax.get_xlim()[0], ax.get_ylim()[0]) max_ = max(ax.get_xlim()[1], ax.get_ylim()[1]) ax.plot([min_, max_], [min_, max_], "-k", alpha=0.3) ax.set_xlim(min_, max_) ax.set_ylim(min_, max_) ax.set_title(metric, pad=12) ax.set_xlabel("train") ticks = [round(x,1) for x in ax.get_xticks() if x <= ax.get_xbound()[1] and x >= ax.get_xbound()[0]] ax.set_xticks(ticks) ax.set_xticklabels(ticks) ax.set_yticks(ticks) ax.set_yticklabels(ticks) ax.grid() axs[0].set_ylabel("test") fig.suptitle(f"{title}", fontsize=24) fig.tight_layout() fig.savefig(f"{title.replace('(','_').replace(')','_')}.png") ъ░АыбЬь╢ХьЭА trainset, ьД╕ыбЬь╢ХьЭА testsetьЮЕыЛИыЛд. ь░иьИШъ░А ъ▒░ыУныРаьИШыбЭ MAEьЩА RMSE, R2 ыкиыСР overfittingьЭ┤ ъ┤Аь░░ыРйыЛИыЛд. 1ь░иыВШ 2ь░иые╝ ъ│аые┤ый┤ ыРШыВШ ьЛ╢ьзАызМ, эХЬы▓И ыНФ эЩХьЭ╕эХйьЛЬыЛд. trainъ│╝ test ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ы╢ДэХаьЭД ыЛдьЛЬ эХ┤ьДЬ эЩХьЭ╕эХйыЛИыЛд. splitьЧР ьВмьЪйыРЬ numpy random seedые╝ ъ╡Рь▓┤эХ┤ьДЬ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ые╝ ыЛдьЛЬ ызМыУдъ│а ыШСъ░ЩьЭ┤ ьзДэЦЙэХйыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░123456789np.random.seed(0)idx_train_2 = np.random.choice(X.index, size=int(X.shape[0]*train_portion))idx_test_2 = list(set(X.index) - set(idx_train_2))X_train_2 = X.loc[idx_train_2]X_test_2 = X.loc[idx_test_2]y_train_2 = y.loc[idx_train_2]y_test_2 = y.loc[idx_test_2] 1plot_metrics(X_train_2, X_test_2, y_train_2, y_test_2, "polynomial degree vs metrics (2)") 1ь░иы│┤ыЛд 2ь░иъ░А y = xьЧР ъ░Аъ╣ЭьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ъ╖╕ыЯ░ыН░ ъ╖╕ъ▓М ым╕ьаЬъ░А ьХДыЛР ъ▓Г ъ░ЩьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ъ▒░ыПЩьЭ┤ ьЩДьаДэЮИ ы░ФыАМьЧИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ьЧР ыФ░ые╕ эО╕ь░иъ░А ьГБыЛ╣эЮИ эБ╜ыЛИыЛд. 3.6. Grid Search Cross Validation: polynomial order sklearn: GridSearchCV ъ╖╕ыЯ░ыН░ эХШыВШ ьЮКьЭА ъ▓ГьЭ┤ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. test dataыКФ ь╡ЬьвЕ ъ▓АьжЭьЪйьЬ╝ыбЬызМ ьВмьЪйэХ┤ьХ╝ьзА, ьЭ┤ыаЗъ▓М ьД▒ыКеьЭД эЕМьКдэК╕ьЕЛьЧР ызЮь╢Фый┤ ъ▓░ъ╡н эЕМьКдэК╕ьЕЛьЧР ьШды▓ДэФ╝эМЕыРа ы┐РьЮЕыЛИыЛд. ьЭ┤ъ▒┤ ьХИы┤дыЛдъ│а ь╣Шъ│а ыНоьЦ┤ыЖУъ│а, train dataызМ ъ░АьзАъ│а ь╡ЬьаБьЭД ь░╛ьХДы┤ЕьЛЬыЛд. Grid Search + Cross ValidationьЭ┤ эХДьЪФэХйыЛИыЛд. ыЛдэХньЛЭьЭШ ь░иьИШызМ ы░Фъ╛╕ый┤ьДЬ ъ░Бъ░БьЭШ cross validataion scoreые╝ ь╕бьаХэХйыЛИыЛд. cv=5ыбЬ ыЛдьДп ы▓И ьИШэЦЙэХЬ ъ╡Рь░иъ▓АьжЭьЭШ эПЙъ╖аъ│╝ эСЬьдАэО╕ь░иые╝ ъ╡мэХйыЛИыЛд. ьД▒ыКеьЭ┤ ьвЛьЬ╝ыадый┤ эПЙъ╖аьЭ┤ ыЖТьХДьХ╝ эХШъ│а, эСЬьдАэО╕ь░иыКФ ьЮСьХДьХ╝ эХйыЛИыЛд. ъ╡Рь░иъ▓АьжЭьЭД ьЛаыв░эХШыадый┤ ьаБьЦ┤ыПД эСЬьдАэО╕ь░иыЭ╝ыПД ьЮСьХДьХ╝ эХйыЛИыЛд. ъ│╝ьЧ░ ъ╖╕ыЯ┤ьзА эЩХьЭ╕эХйыЛИыЛд. ь╜ФыУЬ ы│┤ъ╕░/ьаСъ╕░1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132def plot_cv(X_train, y_train, title): fig, axs = plt.subplots(ncols=3, figsize=(12, 5)) # polynomial degree for degree in range(1, 6): # model build model = linear(degree) # cross validation for scoring, ax in zip(["neg_mean_absolute_error", "neg_mean_squared_error", "r2"], axs): scores = cross_val_score(model, X_train, y_train, scoring=scoring, cv=10) if scoring.startswith("neg_"): scores = -scores # bar plot cvs = ax.bar(degree, scores.mean()) # bar label : barызИыЛд ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ъ░Т эСЬъ╕░ ax.bar_label(cvs, fmt="%.2f", fontsize=14, padding=5) # error bar эСЬэШД ax.errorbar(degree, scores.mean(), yerr=scores.std(), ecolor="darkgray", capsize=5, capthick=2) for title_, ax in zip(["MAE", "RMSE", "R2"], axs): ax.set_title(title_, pad=12) ax.grid(axis="y", c="lightgray", ls=":") xticks = list(range(1, 6)) ax.set_xticks(xticks) ax.set_xticklabels(xticks) fig.suptitle(f"{title}", fontsize=24) fig.tight_layout() fig.savefig(f"{title.replace('(','_').replace(')','_')}.png") ax.bar()ьЧР yerrые╝ ьВмьЪйэХШый┤ ъ╡│ьЭ┤ ax.errorbar() ьЧЖьЭ┤ыПД ьЧРыЯмы░Ф эСЬэШДьЭ┤ ъ░АыКеэХйыЛИыЛд. ъ╖╕ыЯмыВШ ьЭ┤ ъ▓╜ьЪ░ ыкиь▓ШыЯ╝ matplotlib 3.4ьЧР ь▓ШьЭМ ыПДьЮЕыРЬ ax.bar_label()ьЭ┤ errorbar ьЬДьЧР ы╢ЩьЦ┤ ы│┤ъ╕░ эЮШыУныЛИыЛд. Grid Search ъ▓░ъ│╝ые╝ ъ│зьЮе ъ╖╕ыады┤ЕыЛИыЛд.1plot_cv(X_train, y_train, "polynomial order vs metrics (cross validation)") ы░Фъ╛╕ьЧИыНШ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ые╝ ьаБьЪйэХ┤ ы┤ЕыЛИыЛд.1plot_cv(X_train, y_train, "polynomial order vs metrics 2 (cross validation)") ыСР ъ▓╜ьЪ░ ыкиыСР, ъ▓░ъ│╝ые╝ ьЛаыв░эХШъ╕░ьЧРыКФ RMSEьЩА R2ьЭШ эСЬьдАэО╕ь░иъ░А ыДИым┤ыВШ эБ╜ыЛИыЛд. эК╣эЮИ MAEы│┤ыЛд RMSEьЭШ эСЬьдАэО╕ь░иъ░А эБмыЛдыКФ ьаРьЧРьДЬ ьЭ┤ьГБь╣ШьЭШ ьЧнэХаьЭ┤ эБ╝ьЭД ьзРьЮСэХа ьИШ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. 5ь░иьЧРьДЬыКФ R^2 < 0 ызИьаА ыУ▒ьЮеэХШыКФыН░, ыкиыУа ы▓ФьЬДьЧРьДЬ ьДаэШХ эЪМъ╖Аъ░А эЮШьЭД ьУ░ьзА ык╗эХйыЛИыЛд. ьДаэШХ эЪМъ╖Аъ░А ьЧЙызЭьЭ┤ыЭ╝ыКФ ьаРьЧРьДЬ ы╣ДьДаэШХьД▒ьЭ┤ ыздьЪ░ ъ░ХэХШыЛдыКФ ь╢Фь╕бьЭД эХа ьИШ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ыЛдьЭМ ъ╕АьЧРьДЬыКФ ы╣ДьДаэШХ эЪМъ╖АьЧР ыПДьаДэХШъ▓аьК╡ыЛИыЛд.

posts.title: ьВмыЮМьЭД эЦеэХЬ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФ
posts.text: D&I Learning Day 2021ьЧРьДЬ ы░ЬэСЬэХЬ ыВ┤ьЪйьЮЕыЛИыЛд. ыИДъ╡░ъ░АьЧРъ▓М ы│┤ьЭ┤ъ╕░ ьЬДэХЬ ьЮСьЧЕьЬ╝ыбЬьДЬьЭШ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФыбд ъ│аып╝эЦИъ│а,ь╡ЬьДаьЭШ ьЭШьВм ъ▓░ьаХьЭД ьЬДэХЬ ьб░ьЦ╕ьЭ┤ыЭ╝ыКФ ъ▓░ыбаьЭД ьЦ╗ьЧИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьШИьЛЬые╝ ьЬДэХ┤ ьзАыВЬ ъ╕АьЭД ьЮСьД▒эЦИъ│аьЧЕым┤ьаБ, ъ╕░ьИаьаБьЭ╕ ый┤ьЭ┤ ьХДыЛМ ьЛЬъ░БьаБьЭ╕ ый┤ьЧРьДЬ ьаЬ ьЭШыПДьЩА ьЭ┤ьЬаые╝ ьДдыкЕэХШыКФ ы░ЬэСЬьЮЕыЛИыЛд. ыЛдьЦСьД▒ъ│╝ эПмьЪйьД▒ьЭД ьЬДэХЬ AIыЭ╝ыКФ ь╖иьзАьЭШ эЦЙьВмьЮЕыЛИыЛд. ьЪФь▓ны░ЫьЭА ы░ЬэСЬъ░А ьг╝ьаЬьЩАыКФ ьб░ъ╕И ъ▒░ыжмъ░А ьЮИыКФ ыУп эХШьЧм ь▓ШьЭМьЧРыКФ ъ│аьВмэЦИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. эХШьзАызМ ьг╝ъ┤АьВмьЭ╕ (ьг╝)ьЭ╕ъ│╡ьзАыКеэМйэЖаыжмьЭШ ъ╣АэГЬьШБ ыМАэСЬыЛШьЭШ ьДдыУЭьЧР ы░ЬэСЬэХШъ▓М ыРШьЧИьК╡ыЛИыЛд.

posts.title: Visualization with Messages
posts.text: ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФыКФ ьШИьБЬ ъ╖╕ыж╝ьЧР ыи╕ым╝ыЯмьДЬыКФ ьХИ ыРЬыЛдъ│а ьГЭъ░БэХйыЛИыЛд. ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ы╢ДьДЭьЭШ ьЭ╝эЩШьЭ╕ ызМэБ╝ ы╢ДьДЭьЭШ ыкйьаБьЧР ь╢йьЛдэХ┤ьХ╝ эХШыКФ ъ▓ГьЭА ым╝ыбаьЭ┤ъ│а, ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФые╝ ьИШэЦЙэХШыКФ ьВмыЮМызМэБ╝ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ые╝ ъ╣КьЭ┤ эММыКФ ьВмыЮМьЭ┤ ьЧЖьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ь╡Ьъ│аьЭШ ьб░ьЦ╕ьЮРыбЬьДЬьЭШ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФьЧР ыПДьаДэХ┤ы┤ЕыЛИыЛд. 1. ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ Pega Devlog: ьИШыКе Trend VisualizationэХЬъ╡нъ╡РьЬбъ│╝ьаХэПЙъ░АьЫР ыМАэХЩьИШэХЩыКеыаеьЛЬэЧШ ьаХы│┤ъ╡нъ░АэЖ╡ъ│ДэПмэД╕ ьИШыКе ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ые╝ ъ░АьзАъ│а ьЛЬъ░БэЩФые╝ ьИШэЦЙэХЬ ьаБьЭ┤ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьЧмъ╕░ьЧР ьЭ╕ъ╡м ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ые╝ ьЦ╣ьЦ┤ьДЬ ь╢ЬьГЭьХД ьИШьЩАьЭШ ьЧ░ъ┤АьД▒ьЭД ъ╖╕ыады┤ЕьЛЬыЛд. ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ыКФ ьЧмъ╕░ьДЬ ыЛдьЪ┤ы░ЫьЭД ьИШ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьИШыКе ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ыЛдьЪ┤ыбЬыУЬ ь╢ЬьГЭьХД ьИШ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ыЛдьЪ┤ыбЬыУЬ ьЭ┤ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ые╝ ь╢ФьД╕ые╝ ы│┤ьЧмыЛмыЭ╝ыКФ ьЪФь▓ньЧР ыФ░ыЭ╝ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФэЦИыЛдъ│а ъ░АьаХэЦИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. 2. ьЛЬъ░БэЩФ ъ▓░ъ│╝ым╝ ъ▓░ъ│╝ ъ╖╕ыж╝ьЭД ыи╝ьаА ы│┤ьЧмыУЬыжмъ│а, ьаЬ ьГЭъ░БьЭШ ъ│╝ьаХьЭД ыВШьдСьЧР ызРьФАыУЬыжмъ▓аьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьЛЬъ░БэЩФ ыкйьаБьЭА ьаАь╢ЬьВ░ ь╢ФьД╕ые╝ ы░ШьШБэХЬ 20ыЕД ыТд ыМАэХЩ ыУ▒ ъ╡РьЬб ьаХь▒Е ьИШыж╜ьЬ╝ыбЬ ъ░АьаХэЦИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ыЛиьИЬэХШъ▓М ыЕДыПДы│Д ь╢ЬьВ░ыеаъ│╝ ьИШыКе ьзАьЫРьЮР zorder=2)# spines ьаХыжмfor s in ["left", "right", "top"]: ax.spines[s].set_visible(False) ax_sn.spines[s].set_visible(False)# ь╢ЬьГЭ x, yь╢Х ы▓ФьЬД ьзАьаХax.set_xlim(1975, 2021)ax.set_ylim(0, ) # ьИШыКе x, y ь╢Х ы▓ФьЬД ьзАьаХoffset_sn = 19ax_sn.set_xlim(1975+offset_sn, 2021+offset_sn) # grid ь╢Фъ░Аax.grid(axis="y")# ь╢ЬьГЭыЕДыПД bottom spine ьГЙьГБьЭД line plotъ│╝ эЖ╡ьЭ╝ax.spines["bottom"].set_edgecolor(color_birth)ax.tick_params(axis="x", color=color_birth, labelcolor=color_birth)# ьИШыКе эХЩыЕДыПД xticksые╝ bottomьЬ╝ыбЬ ьЭ┤ыПЩax_sn.xaxis.set_ticks_position("bottom")# ьИШыКе эХЩыЕДыПД bottom spineьЭД ьХДыЮШыбЬ ьЭ┤ыПЩ, ьИШыКе ъ│бьДа ьГЙьГБъ│╝ эЖ╡ьЭ╝ax_sn.spines["bottom"].set_position(("axes", -0.12))ax_sn.spines["bottom"].set_edgecolor(color_sn)ax_sn.tick_params(color=color_sn, labelcolor=color_sn)# yticklabelsyticks = list(np.linspace(0, 1e6, 6))ax.set_yticks(yticks)ax.set_yticklabels([f"{int(y/1e4)}ызМыкЕ" if y > 0 else "0ыкЕ" for y in yticks])# xticklabelsfont_xlabel = {"fontsize":18, "ha":"left", "fontweight":"bold"}ax.text(1.06, -0.075, "ь╢ЬьГЭыЕДыПД", transform=ax.transAxes, fontdict=font_xlabel, color=color_birth)ax.text(1.06, -0.195, "ьИШыКе эХЩыЕДыПД", transform=ax.transAxes, fontdict=font_xlabel, color=color_sn)# titleax.set_title("ыЕДыПДы│Д ь╢ЬьГЭ ы░П ьИШэХЩыКеыаеьЛЬэЧШ ьзАьЫРьЮР ь╢ФьЭ┤", fontsize=24, fontweight="bold", pad=32)# 2002ыЕД(index 29), 2020ыЕД(index 47) ь╢ЬьГЭьЮР ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ь╢Фъ░Аfont_annot = {"ha":"center", "fontsize":16, "color":"k", "alpha":0.8}font_textyear = {"fontsize": 18, "ha":"center"}annot_birth_y = 8e5annot_birth_offset = 5e4annot_birth_yearoffset = 1e5for idx in [29, 47]: # ь╢ЬьГЭьЮР ax.annotate(format(df_birth.loc[idx, "num_birth"], ",") + " ыкЕ", xy=(df_birth.loc[idx, "year"], df_birth.loc[idx, "num_birth"]+annot_birth_offset), xytext=(df_birth.loc[idx, "year"], annot_birth_y), arrowprops={"facecolor":color_birth}, bbox={"boxstyle":"round", "pad":0.4, "facecolor":"w", "edgecolor":color_birth}, ha="center", fontsize=16, color=color_birth, alpha=0.8 ) ax.text(df_birth.loc[idx, "year"], annot_birth_y + annot_birth_yearoffset, str(df_birth.loc[idx, "year"]), transform=ax.transData, fontdict=font_textyear, color=color_birth)# ь╢ЬьГЭьЮР ьИШ legend ax.text(1.06, 0.79, "ь╢ЬьГЭьЮР ьИШ", transform=ax.transAxes, fontdict=font_xlabel, color=color_birth)# 2021эХЩыЕДыПД ьИШыКе ьзАьЫРьЮР ь╢Фъ░Аannot_sn_y = 17e4annot_sn_offset = -5e4annot_sn_year_offset = -1e5ax_sn.annotate(format(df_sn.loc[28, "apply"], ",") + " ыкЕ", xy=(df_sn.loc[28, "year"], df_sn.loc[28, "apply"]+annot_sn_offset), xytext=(df_sn.loc[28, "year"], annot_sn_y), arrowprops={"facecolor":color_sn}, bbox={"boxstyle":"round", "pad":0.4, "facecolor":"w", "edgecolor":color_sn}, ha="center", fontsize=16, color=color_sn, alpha=0.8 )ax_sn.text(2021, annot_sn_y + annot_sn_year_offset, "2021", transform=ax_sn.transData, fontdict=font_textyear, color=color_sn)# 2002ыЕДьЧРьДЬ 2020ыЕДъ╣МьзА ь╢ЬьГЭьЮР ъ░РьЖМьЬиdelta_birth_ratio = df_birth.loc[47, "num_birth"]/df_birth.loc[29, "num_birth"]# 2039эХЩыЕДыПД ьШИьГБ ьИШыКе ьзАьЫРьЮР ьИШapply_2039 = int(df_sn.loc[28, "apply"] * delta_birth_ratio)# 2039эХЩыЕДыПД ьШИьГБ ьИШыКе ьзАьЫРьЮР ь╢Фъ░Аax_sn.annotate(f"{format(apply_2039, ',')} ыкЕ (?)", xy=(2039, df_birth.loc[47, "num_birth"] + annot_sn_offset), xytext=(2039, annot_sn_y), arrowprops={"facecolor":color_sn}, bbox={"boxstyle":"round", "pad":0.4, "facecolor":"w", "edgecolor":color_sn, "ls":":"}, ha="center", fontsize=16, color=color_sn, alpha=0.8 )ax_sn.text(2039, annot_sn_y + annot_sn_year_offset, "2039", transform=ax_sn.transData, fontdict=font_textyear, color=color_sn)# ьИШыКе ьзАьЫРьЮР legendax.text(1.06, 0.17, "ьИШыКе ьзАьЫРьЮР", transform=ax.transAxes, fontdict=font_xlabel, color=color_sn)# ы░ХьКдъ╢М ыУ▒ыЭ╜ ь╢Фъ░Аax.axvspan(2002, 2015, fc="gray", alpha=0.3)ax.text(2008.5, 6e5, "эШДьГБ ьЬаьзА\n(2021 - 2034 эХЩыЕДыПД)", fontdict=font_textyear, color="k")# 2034ыЕД эЫД ъ╕ЙыЭ╜ax.axvspan(2015, 2021, fc="r", alpha=0.3)ax.text(2017.5, 6e5, "ъ╕Йъ░Р\n(-45 %)", fontdict=font_textyear, color="brown", fontweight="bold")# 2021ыЕДыПД ьзАьЫРьЮР ьдС ы╣ДьЬи эСЬъ╕░num_enroll = format(df_sn['enroll'].iloc[-1], ',')num_grad = format(df_sn['grad'].iloc[-1], ',')num_ged = format(df_sn['ged'].iloc[-1], ',')font_category = {"fontsize":18, "ha":"left", "color":"k"}ax_sn.text(1997, 4e5, "тА╗ 2021эХЩыЕДыПД ьИШыКе ьзАьЫРьЮР", fontdict=font_category, fontweight="bold") ax_sn.text(1997, 3e5, f" ьЮмэХЩьГЭ : {num_enroll} ыкЕ ({df_sn['enroll'].iloc[-1]/df_sn['apply'].iloc[-1]*100:.1f} %)", fontdict=font_category)ax_sn.text(1997, 2e5, f" ьб╕ьЧЕьГЭ : {num_grad} ыкЕ ({df_sn['grad'].iloc[-1]/df_sn['apply'].iloc[-1]*100:.1f} %)", fontdict=font_category)ax_sn.text(1997, 1e5, f" ъ│аьЛЬ ыУ▒: {num_ged} ыкЕ ({df_sn['ged'].iloc[-1]/df_sn['apply'].iloc[-1]*100:.1f} %)", fontdict=font_category)fig.tight_layout() 4. ьЖМьКд ь╜ФыУЬ ьЬД ь╜ФыУЬьЩА ъ╖╕ыж╝ьЭ┤ ыЛ┤ъ╕┤ ыЕ╕эК╕ы╢БьЭА ьЧмъ╕░ьЧРьДЬ ыЛдьЪ┤ыбЬыУЬ ы░ЫьЬ╝ьЛд ьИШ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ыЛдьЪ┤ыбЬыУЬ

posts.title: ьГЙьЭШ ьЖНьД▒ьЧР ыМАэХЬ ыЛиьЦ┤ыУд
posts.text:
contributor : Jerry Kim ьГЙьЭД ъ│аые┤ыЛд ы│┤ый┤ ьЭ┤ыЯ░ ыЛиьЦ┤ыУдьЭД ызМыВйыЛИыЛд:Brightness, Lightness, Value, Luminosity, Luma ьЪ░ыжм ызРыбЬыКФ ыкиыСР ыкЕыПД, ыкЕыПД, ыкЕыПД, ыкЕыПД, ыкЕыПДьЭ┤ьзАызМ ьЭШып╕ъ░А ыкиыСР ыЛдыжЕыЛИыЛд. ъ░ЩьЭА ыЬ╗ьЬ╝ыбЬ ьГЭъ░БэХШый┤ ьЛдьИШэХа ьИШыПД ьЮИьЬ╝ыЛИ эХЬы▓И ьзЪъ│а ыДШьЦ┤ъ░СьЛЬыЛд. 1. ьЪйьЦ┤ ьаХыжм Gilchrist, тАЬLightness and BrightnessтАЭ, Curr Biol. 2007Lightness, Lumiosity, Luminance and Other Tonal Descriptorswikipedia: CIELAB color spacewikipedia: HSL and HSVыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФ, ьЭ╕ьзАъ│╝эХЩьЭД ызМыВШыЛд (ьЧРьЭ┤ь╜Ш) lightnessьЩА brightnessьЧР ыМАэХЬ ъ╕АьЭА 2007ыЕДьЭШ ыЕ╝ым╕ ьДдыкЕьЭ┤ ъ░АьЮе ьЩАыЛ┐ьХШьК╡ыЛИыЛд. valueьЭШ ьЭШып╕ыКФ wikipediaъ░А ъ░АьЮе ьЭ┤эХ┤эХШъ╕░ ьвЛьХШъ│а, ьаДы░ШьаБьЬ╝ыбЬыКФ ьЭ┤ ъ╕АьЧР ьЪйьЦ┤ыУдьЭ┤ ьЮШ ьаХыжмыРШьЦ┤ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьаЬ ы╕ФыбЬъ╖╕ ъ╕АьЧРьДЬыПД ьЪйьЦ┤ъ░А ьЩФыЛдъ░ФыЛд эХ┤ьЩФьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьЭ┤ьаЬы╢АэД░ыЭ╝ыПД эЖ╡ьЭ╝эХШыадъ│а эХйыЛИыЛд. ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ьЛЬъ░БэЩФ, ьЭ╕ьзАъ│╝эХЩьЭД ызМыВШыЛдьЭШ ы▓ИьЧньЭД ьг╝ыбЬ ыФ░ыЮРьК╡ыЛИыЛд. brightness : ыкЕыПД(цШОх║ж) lightness : ы░Эъ╕░ luminance : эЬШыПД(ш╝Эх║ж) luminosity(luminous intensity) : ъ┤СыПД(хЕЙх║ж) hue : ьГЙьГБ(шЙ▓чЫ╕) value : ы░╕ыеШ ыкиыУа ым╕ьДЬьЧР ыкЕыПДыбЬ ы▓ИьЧныРШьЦ┤ ьЮИьзАызМ brightness, lightnessьЩА ь╢йыПМэХйыЛИыЛд. ъ│аып╝ьЭД ъ▒░ыУнэХЬ ыБЭьЧР ьШБьЦ┤ ы░ЬьЭМьЭД ъ╖╕ыМАыбЬ ьВмьЪйэХШъ╕░ыбЬ эЦИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. relative luminance : ьГБыМА эЬШыПД 1.1. ъ░ДыЛиэХЬ ьЧньВм Young-Helmholtz theorywolfcrow: What is the difference between CIE LAB, CIE RGB, CIE xyY and CIE XYZ? ы│╡ьЮбэХЬ ьЭ╝ьЭА ьЧньВмые╝ ыУдьЧмыЛды│┤ый┤ ь▓┤ъ│Дъ░А ьЮбэЮИъ╕░ыПД эХйыЛИыЛд. 1850ыЕДъ▓╜ - RGB 3ьЫРьГЙ ьЭ┤ыба: ьШБ-эЧмыжДэЩАь╕а ьГЙъ░БьДд тАЬы╣ЫьЭШ 3ьЫРьГЙтАЭ = Red, Green, Blue R + G + B = White. ьДЮьЭД ьИШыбЭ ы░ЭьХДьзР. 1906ыЕД - CMYK 4ьГЙ ьЭ╕ьЗД: the Eagle Printing Ink Company тАЬьГЙьЭШ 3ьЫРьГЙтАЭ = Cyan, Magenta, Yellow C + M + Y = Black. ьДЮьЭД ьИШыбЭ ьЦ┤ыСРьЫМьзР. ьИШы░▒ыЕД ьаД RYB тЖТ CMY тЖТ CMYK 1913ыЕД - ъ╡ньаЬ ьб░ыкЕ ьЬДьЫРэЪМ(CIE) ьДдыж╜ Commission Internationale de lтАЩ├йclairage ьГЙьЧР ыМАэХЬ эСЬьдА ыУ▒ьЭД ьаХыж╜эХШыКФ ыЛиь▓┤ 1931ыЕД - CIERGB, CIEXYZ ьГЙъ│╡ъ░Д ьаХыж╜ RGB : 1920ыЕДыМА ьИШэЦЙыРЬ ьЭ╕ъ░Д ьЛЬъ░БьЧР ыМАэХЬ ьЧ░ъ╡м ъ╕░ы░Ш (W. David Wright and John Guild) XYZ : ыЛ╣ьЛЬъ╣МьзА ьХМыадьзД ьЭ╕ъ░Д ьЛЬъ░БьЭШ ьИШэХЩьаБ эХЬъ│Д. Y=эЬШыПД, Z~blue, X=эЬШыПДьЩА ьзБъ╡РэХШыКФ RGBьЭШ ыВШыи╕ьзА ьЪФьЖМ 1938ыЕД - HSL ьГЙъ│╡ъ░Д ьаХыж╜ Hue, Saturation, Luminosity (or Lightness) ыкйьаБ : эЭСы░▒ьЬ╝ыбЬ ьзДэЦЙыРШыНШ TV ы░йьЖбьЧР эЬШыПД(L) ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ ы│Аъ▓╜ ьЧЖьЭ┤ color encoding ь╢Фъ░А 1956ыЕД - ьД╕ ъ░АьзА ьЫРы┐ФьД╕эПмъ░А R, G, Bые╝ ьЭ╕ьЛЭэХЬыЛдыКФ ъ▓ГьЭ┤ ьХМыадьзР (Svaetichin, Acta Physiol Scand Suppl. 1956) ъ░РьЭСэХШыКФ эММьЮеьЭА 558 nm, 531 nm, 419 nm ьШБьЧн. ьЫРы┐ФьД╕эПмьЭШ ы╣ДьЬиьЭА R : G : B = 40 : 20 : 1 1970ыЕДыМА ьдСы░Ш - HSV ьГЙъ│╡ъ░Д ьаХыж╜ Hue, Saturation, Value ыкйьаБ : HSLы│┤ыЛд ьаДэЖ╡ьаБьЭ┤ъ│а ьзБъ┤АьаБьЭ╕ ьГЙ эШ╝эХй ыкиыН╕ ьГЙьЭ┤ ьЦ┤ыЦ╗ъ▓М эШ╝эХйыРШъ│а ьВмыЮМьЭШ ыИИьЧР ьЦ┤ыЦ╗ъ▓М ы│┤ьЭ┤ыКФьзАьЧР ьдСьаР. 1976ыЕД - CIELAB ьГЙъ│╡ъ░Д ьаХыж╜ ыкйьаБ : ьВмыЮМьЭШ ьЭ╕ьЛЭъ│╝ ь╡ЬыМАэХЬ ы╣ДьК╖эХЬ ьГЙ ъ│╡ъ░Д ъ╡мэШД L^* : эЬШыПД. black = 0, white = 100 a^* : green-red ьЪФьЖМ. -128 ~ 127 b^* : blue-yellow ьЪФьЖМ. -128 ~ 127 1.2. ьЪйьЦ┤ьЭШ ыЬ╗ luminosity(ъ┤СыПД) vs luminance(эЬШыПД) ъ┤СыПД : ым╝ь▓┤ьЧРьДЬ ы░ЬьВ░ыРШыКФ ы╣Ы ьЧРыДИьзА. эЬШыПД : ъ┤Аь░░ьЮРьЭШ ыИИьЧР ыУдьЦ┤ьШдыКФ ы╣Ы. ыЛиьЬД ый┤ьаБыЛ╣ ъ┤СыПД. ьГБэЩйьЧР ыФ░ыЭ╝ ыСШ ыЛд HSLьЭШ ъ╡мьД▒ьЪФьЖМыбЬ ьВмьЪйыРи. brightness(ыкЕыПД) vs lightness(ы░Эъ╕░) ыкЕыПД : ьЦ┤ыСРьЫАъ│╝ ы░ЭьЭМьЭШ ьаХыПД. ьг╝ъ┤АьаБьЭ╕ ьИШь╣Ш. ы╣ЫьЭШ ьЭ╕ьЛЭ : тАЬperception of luminanceтАЭ ы░Эъ╕░ : эЭ░ьГЙъ│╝ ъ▓АьаХьЭШ ьаХыПД. ъ░Эъ┤АьаБьЭ╕ ьИШь╣Ш. ы╣ЫьЭ┤ ы░ШьВмыРШыКФ эСЬый┤ьЭШ ьЭ╕ьЛЭ : тАЬperception of reflectanceтАЭ ьГБэЩйьЧР ыФ░ыЭ╝ HSLьЭШ ъ╡мьД▒ьЪФьЖМыбЬ ьВмьЪйыРи. lightness(ы░Эъ╕░) vs value(ы░╕ыеШ) ьЬаь▒ДьГЙьЭШ ы░Эъ╕░ : ьЬаь▒ДьГЙьЧР эХШьЦА ым╝ъ░РьЭД ьДЮьЭА ьаХыПД. эХШьЦА ым╝ъ░РьЭД ьХДьг╝ ызОьЭ┤ ьДЮьЬ╝ый┤ ы│╕ыЮШ ьГЙьЭ┤ ьВмыЭ╝ьзАъ│а эХШьЦА ьГЙьЭ┤ ыРи. ьЬаь▒ДьГЙьЭШ ьаХыПД : ьЬаь▒ДьГЙьЧР ы░ЭьЭА ы╣ЫьЭД ы╣Дь╢Ш ьаХыПД. ы░ЭьЭА ы╣ЫьЭД ьХДьг╝ ъ░ХэХШъ▓М ы╣Дь╢░ыПД ы│╕ыЮШ ьГЙьЭ┤ ыУЬыЯмыВи. relative luminance(ьГБыМА эЬШыПД) RGB ыкиыЛИэД░ьЭШ ы░Эъ╕░ CIEXYZьЭШ Y(эЬШыПД)ьЩА ьЬаьВм. $Y = 0.2126R + 0.7152G + 0.0722B$ 2. Matplotlib Colormap ьЖНьД▒ ы╢ДьДЭ matplotlib: Choosing Colormaps in Matplotlib matplotlibьЧРыКФ ь╗мыЯмыз╡ьЭ┤ ыЛдьИШ ыВ┤ьЮеыРШьЦ┤ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьЭ┤ыУд ь╗мыЯмыз╡ьЭА ьЦ┤ыЦд ьГЙыУдьЭД ъ░АьзАъ│а ьЮИыКФьзА ьВ┤эО┤ы┤ЕьЛЬыЛд. ьг╝ьЭШэХа ьВмэХньЭ┤ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. Matplotlib ъ│╡ьЛЭым╕ьДЬьЧР lightness($L^*$)ыЭ╝ыКФ эСЬэШДьЭ┤ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьЭ┤ $L^*$ыКФ CIELAB ьГЙъ│╡ъ░ДьЭШ эЬШыПД(luminance)ьЭ┤ъ│а, ы░Эъ╕░(lightness)ьЩАыКФ ыЛдыжЕыЛИыЛд. ьВмыЮМьЭ┤ ьЭ╕ьзАэХШыКФ ы░ЭьЭА ьаХыПДыКФ эЬШыПД($L^*$)ъ░А ъ░Аъ╣ЭьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ьГЙ(color)ьЭ┤ыЭ╝ыКФ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ьЭШ ьЖНьД▒ьЭ┤ ьЦ┤ыЦ╗ъ▓М ыЛдые╕ьзА ьЧДы░АэЮИ ыФ░ьа╕ы│┤ъ▓аьК╡ыЛИыЛд. эЭФэЮИ ыкЕыПДыбЬ эЖ╡ьЪйыРШыКФ ыН░ьЭ┤эД░ьЧР ьзСьдСэХйыЛИыЛд. ы░╕ыеШ(V), эЬШыПД(L^*), ьГБыМА эЬШыПД(rL^*), ы░Эъ╕░(L)ъ░А ъ╖╕ ыМАьГБьЮЕыЛИыЛд. 2.1. Qualitative colormapьЭА ъ░пьИШъ░А ьзАьаХыРШьЦ┤ ьЮИьК╡ыЛИыЛд. ъ╖╕ ьЩ╕ьЭШ ь╗мыЯмыз╡ьЭА ъ░пьИШые╝ ьзАьаХэХ┤ьХ╝ эХйыЛИыЛд. 10ъ░ЬыбЬ ьзАьаХэХйыЛИыЛд. 1234567891011121314151617import matplotlib.pyplot as pltfrom matplotlib import cm# ь╗мыЯмыз╡ ы╢ИыЯмьШдъ╕░cmap_ = plt.get_cmap("tab10")# ь╗мыЯмыз╡ьЭШ ьГЙ ьИШncmap = len(cmap_.colors)try: # qualitative colormap ncmap = len(cmap_.colors)except AttributeError: # others ncmap = 10 cmap_ = cm.get_cmap(cmap, ncmap)# ьИШъ░А ыДИым┤ ызОьЬ╝ый┤ 10ъ░ЬыбЬ ьаЬэХЬif ncmap > 15: ncmap = 10 3.2.2. ь╗мыЯмыз╡ subplots ыВШыИДъ╕░ ыкйьаБьЧР ызЮъ▓М subplotsые╝ ьдАы╣ДэХйыЛИыЛд. ьвМь╕б ьГБыЛи ъ╡мьЧньЧР ьГЙьГБьЭД эХШыВШьФй ыДгьЭД ъ▓ГьЮЕыЛИыЛд. line plotьЭД ъ╖╕ыж┤ ъ│╡ъ░Дъ╣МьзА ьЮШыады▓Дыа╕ьзАызМ ьЭ╝ыЛи ыДШьЦ┤ъ░СыЛИыЛд. ьЬД ъ╖╕ыж╝ьЭД ъ╖╕ыж░ ь╜ФыУЬыКФ ьЭ┤ыаЗьК╡ыЛИыЛд.123456789101112131415161718192021# subplots ыВШыИДъ╕░ (ncmap ы░ШьШБ)fig, axes = plt.subplots(ncols=ncmap+1, nrows=2, figsize=(10, 3), gridspec_kw={"height_ratios":[1, 2], "width_ratios": [7/ncmap]*ncmap + [3]} )# эП░эК╕ ьДдьаХfonts_ex = {"color":"gray", "ha":"center", "va":"center", "fontsize":"x-large"}# ъ╕АьЮР ыДгъ╕░fig.text(0.35, 0.83, "colors in colormap (list)", fontdict=fonts_ex)axes[0, -1].text(0.5, 0.5, "(blank)", fontdict=fonts_ex)fig.text(0.35, 0.33, "HSV (line plot)", fontdict=fonts_ex)axes[1, -1].text(0.5, 0.5, "HSV distribution
